step_rationale: Epoxygenase promoting angiogenesis and endothelial function post-MI; off atherothrombotic axis.
mechanism: CYP2J2 generates epoxyeicosatrienoic acids that promote angiogenesis and endothelial recovery post-MI but do not participate directly in atherothrombosis.

references.title: Endothelium-specific CYP2J2 overexpression improves cardiac dysfunction by promoting angiogenesis via Jagged1/Notch1 signaling.
references.journal: Journal of molecular and cellular cardiology
